background.mesh: radial-gradient(at 40% 20%, hsla(28,100%,74%,1) 0px, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(at 80% 0%, hsla(189,100%,56%,1) 0px, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(at 0% 50%, hsla(355,100%,93%,1) 0px, transparent 50%)

keyframes.shake: translateX(0) to translateX(-10px) to translateX(10px) to translateX(0)
keyframes.swing: rotate(0deg) to rotate(15deg) to rotate(-10deg) to rotate(5deg) to rotate(-5deg) to rotate(0deg)
keyframes.flash: opacity: 1 to opacity: 0 to opacity: 1 to opacity: 0 to opacity: 1
keyframes.rubberBand: scale(1) to scale(1.25, 0.75) to scale(0.75, 1.25) to scale(1.15, 0.85) to scale(0.95, 1.05) to scale(1)
keyframes.wobble: translateX(0) to translateX(-25%) rotate(-5deg) to translateX(20%) rotate(3deg) to translateX(-15%) rotate(-3deg) to translateX(10%) rotate(2deg) to translateX(0)
keyframes.jello: skewX(0deg) skewY(0deg) to skewX(-12.5deg) skewY(-12.5deg) to skewX(6.25deg) skewY(6.25deg) to skewX(-3.125deg) skewY(-3.125deg) to skewX(0deg) skewY(0deg)
keyframes.heartBeat: scale(1) to scale(1.3) to scale(1) to scale(1.3) to scale(1)
keyframes.lightSpeed: translateX(100%) skewX(-30deg) opacity: 0 to translateX(0%) skewX(0deg) opacity: 1
keyframes.rollIn: translateX(-100%) rotate(-120deg) opacity: 0 to translateX(0%) rotate(0deg) opacity: 1
keyframes.rollOut: translateX(0%) rotate(0deg) opacity: 1 to translateX(100%) rotate(120deg) opacity: 0
keyframes.hinge: rotate(0deg) to rotate(80deg) to rotate(60deg) to rotate(80deg) translateY(0) to rotate(60deg) translateY(0) opacity: 1 to rotate(60deg) translateY(700px) opacity: 0
keyframes.jackInTheBox: scale(0.1) rotate(30deg) opacity: 0 to scale(0.5) rotate(-10deg) to scale(0.7) rotate(3deg) to scale(1) rotate(0deg) opacity: 1
keyframes.glitch: transform: translate(0) to transform: translate(-2px, 2px) to transform: translate(-2px, -2px) to transform: translate(2px, 2px) to transform: translate(0)
keyframes.wave: transform: translateY(0) to transform: translateY(-15px) to transform: translateY(0)
keyframes.ripple: transform: scale(1) opacity: 1 to transform: scale(1.5) opacity: 0
